title: tog-pegasus bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[2.14.1-78.0.1]
- Added pegasus-enterprise.patch to allow detection of oracle-release

[2:2.14.1-78]
- Support added for post-quantum cryptography
  Resolves: RHEL-93093

[2:2.14.1-77]
- Update OpenSSL certificates set up
  Resolves: RHEL-86503
- Remove deprecated path from systemd service file
  Resolves: RHEL-86502
full_text:
[2.14.1-78.0.1]
- Added pegasus-enterprise.patch to allow detection of oracle-release

[2:2.14.1-78]
- Support added for post-quantum cryptography
  Resolves: RHEL-93093

[2:2.14.1-77]
- Update OpenSSL certificates set up
  Resolves: RHEL-86503
- Remove deprecated path from systemd service file
  Resolves: RHEL-86502

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20328-0.html
